title: DevOps
description: A complete path through DevOps as of 2026: foundations and culture, Linux and networking, version control, scripting and automation, build and artifact management, service mesh and API gateway, infrastructure as code, configuration management, CI/CD, GitOps, progressive delivery, observability, logging and tracing, SRE, incident management, chaos engineering, DevSecOps and supply chain security, compliance and policy, cloud-native and multi-cloud, platform engineering and internal developer platforms, FinOps, DatabaseOps, MLOps and LLMOps, documentation, AI-augmented DevOps and careers. Containers/Docker and Kubernetes are covered in their own dedicated subjects.
